decisions.rationale: ci-cd-pipeline entries with empty titles — keep all distinct findings
CWE-548 Information Disclosure: /ftp and /encryptionkeys are distinct attack surfaces and locations — keep separate
CWE-916 MD5 password hashing affects both authentication layer and data layer with different impacts — keep both for component-specific mitigations
CWE-94: SSTI+eval on userProfile is distinct from RCE in B2B order eval — different components, triggers, and mitigations
